tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"cisco-switch","command":"enable
configure terminal
ip access-list extended COPP_ICMP
 permit icmp any any
ip access-list extended COPP_OTHER
 permit ip any any
class-map match-any CM_ICMP
 match access-group name COPP_ICMP
class-map match-any CM_OTHER
 match access-group name COPP_OTHER
policy-map PM_COPP
 class CM_ICMP
  police 8000 8000 exceed-action drop
 class CM_OTHER
  police 10000000 1000000 exceed-action drop
control-plane
 service-policy input PM_COPP
end
write memory"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
ate to up
*Mar 16 19:25:30.300: %LINK-3-UPDOWN: Interface GigabitEthernet0/1, changed state to up
*Mar 16 19:25:30.301: %LINK-3-UPDOWN: Interface GigabitEthernet0/0, changed state to up
*Mar 16 19:25:33.421: %SYS-5-RESTART: System restarted --
